作.mnemonic: A person making something with sudden skilled strokes — to make/create.

使.mnemonic: A person directing an official — to use or employ someone.

例.mnemonic: A person standing in a row sets the example for all.

供.mnemonic: A person offering things together — to supply or provide.

依.mnemonic: A person leaning on clothing for warmth — to depend on.

価.mnemonic: A person trading goods in the market — setting the price/value.

便.mnemonic: A person making changes to smooth the way — convenient.

係.mnemonic: A person tied into a system of threads — a relationship or connection.

保.mnemonic: A person clinging firmly to something dull-safe — to protect and keep.

信.mnemonic: A person whose spoken words can be trusted — belief/faith.

倒.mnemonic: A person who arrives and crashes down — to topple or fall over.

借.mnemonic: A person reaching into the past to get something — to borrow.

偉.mnemonic: A person of towering leather-wrapped stature — great and mighty.

健.mnemonic: A person who builds up their body every day — healthy and strong.

偽.mnemonic: A person merely acting as if doing — false and fake.

振.mnemonic: A hand shakes at dawn's first light — to swing and vibrate.

捉.mnemonic: A hand snatches a fleeing foot — to catch someone.

据.mnemonic: A hand places something where it will reside — to set firmly.

掛.mnemonic: A hand hangs a divination sign on the wall — to suspend.

採.mnemonic: A hand reaches into a tree to pick fruit — to harvest.

接.mnemonic: Hands reach out to greet the lady — to contact and receive.

控.mnemonic: A hand holds back the empty sky — to restrain and control.

提.mnemonic: A hand lifts what is correct for all to see — to propose.

握.mnemonic: A hand grips the house key tightly — to grasp and hold.

擬.mnemonic: A hand copies with doubt — to imitate and simulate.

改.mnemonic: Strike yourself to shed old habits — to reform and change.

放.mnemonic: Strike outward in a direction to let it fly free — to release.

政.mnemonic: Strike to make things correct — that is governance.

故.mnemonic: Old things struck down become reasons and causes — therefore.

敗.mnemonic: Strike the money shell until it shatters — total defeat.

話.mnemonic: Words from the tongue — to speak and converse.

詳.mnemonic: Speak like a sheep giving every detail — thorough.

認.mnemonic: Endure the speech until you recognize the truth.

語.mnemonic: My own words form a language.

誤.mnemonic: Words given in the wrong way become an error.

説.mnemonic: Exchange words to explain a theory.

読.mnemonic: Sell words by reading them aloud.

課.mnemonic: Speak about the fruit of your work — a lesson or task.

調.mnemonic: Speak all around to investigate and tune things.

請.mnemonic: Clear, sincere words form a request.

論.mnemonic: Ordered speech builds a logical argument.

謳.mnemonic: Words divided into sections ring out as song.

一.mnemonic: A single horizontal stroke — the number one.

上.mnemonic: A line rising above a base — going up.

不.mnemonic: A bird landing and refusing to go further — negation.

且.mnemonic: Stacked layers on a base — piling up item by item.

世.mnemonic: Three tens interlinked — generations passing through time.

並.mnemonic: Two people standing side by side on the ground — line up.

中.mnemonic: An arrow piercing the exact center of a box — middle.

主.mnemonic: A flame atop a candle stand — the master presiding.

乗.mnemonic: A person riding atop a tree — to board and ride.

了.mnemonic: A hook that closes off — the end, finished.

事.mnemonic: A hand grasping a layered matter — an affair to handle.

二.mnemonic: Two horizontal strokes stacked — the number two.

亡.mnemonic: A person hidden under a cover — gone, deceased.

交.mnemonic: A person with crossed legs — intersect and meet.

人.mnemonic: Two legs walking — a person striding forward.

今.mnemonic: A roof over a gathered mouth — right now, this moment.

仕.mnemonic: A person serving at their post — to serve or work.

他.mnemonic: A person pointing elsewhere — that other one over there.

付.mnemonic: A person handing something to another — to attach or give.

代.mnemonic: A person wielding a weapon to mark an era — a generation or era.

以.mnemonic: A person carrying a plow — using tools means 'by means of'.

仮.mnemonic: A person who is on loan — temporary, provisional.

件.mnemonic: A person beside an ox — a matter or item to be dealt with.

会.mnemonic: People gathering under a roof — a meeting or assembly.

伝.mnemonic: A person passing something along a line — to transmit or convey.

似.mnemonic: A person beside another like them — to resemble.

位.mnemonic: A person standing in their place — rank or position.

体.mnemonic: A person leaning against a tree — the body, physical self.

何.mnemonic: A person carrying a load on their shoulder — asking what it is.

余.mnemonic: A surplus of food stored under a shelter — excess, the remaining.

傀.mnemonic: A person as large and imposing as a mountain — a giant puppet.

備.mnemonic: A person stands by an arrow-rack, fully prepared.

働.mnemonic: A person exerts their strength, moving with force — to work.

僚.mnemonic: A person with fire and a roof overhead — a colleague sharing the same hearth.

儀.mnemonic: A person follows sheep-like rules of propriety — a ceremony.

儡.mnemonic: A person tangled in a net of fields — a puppet controlled by others.

元.mnemonic: Two strokes over legs — the head/origin, the very beginning.

兄.mnemonic: A mouth atop legs — the elder brother who speaks with authority.

先.mnemonic: Earth under legs in front — the one who stepped ahead first.

免.mnemonic: A figure twisting free under a hat — to escape or be exempt.

児.mnemonic: A臼-shaped head on little legs — a small child.

入.mnemonic: Two strokes angling inward — entering through a gap.

全.mnemonic: A person enters under a roof completely — whole and entire.

八.mnemonic: Two strokes spreading apart — dividing into eight.

兵.mnemonic: Two hands grip an axe — a soldier ready for battle.

内.mnemonic: A person hidden inside a box — inside.

円.mnemonic: A boundary enclosing one stroke — a round coin worth yen.

処.mnemonic: A table where someone sits to handle their place of business.

出.mnemonic: Two mountains stacked up — something jutting out.

分.mnemonic: A knife splits the eight — dividing into parts.

切.mnemonic: Seven things cut by a knife — to cut.

別.mnemonic: Bones separated by a knife — to separate, another.

利.mnemonic: Harvesting grain with a knife brings profit.

刻.mnemonic: A pig's head carved by a knife — to engrave time.

則.mnemonic: A tripod vessel beside a knife lays down the rule.

前.mnemonic: Feet moving forward under a moon, knife urging you ahead.

割.mnemonic: A dwelling split open by a knife — to divide.

力.mnemonic: A flexed arm muscle — power and strength.

加.mnemonic: Force your mouth to speak louder — to add, increase.

助.mnemonic: Stack up strength with force to render aid — to help.

努.mnemonic: A woman with a slave's strength puts in great effort.

労.mnemonic: Fire lights up the night so a worker can toil with strength.

勉.mnemonic: One who is exempt still forces themselves to study with strength.

動.mnemonic: Heavy weight set in motion requires great strength to move.

勝.mnemonic: Rising flesh and strength together — you win by pushing through.

勢.mnemonic: A person on earth wielding force creates a powerful momentum.

勲.mnemonic: Thick smoke from burning deeds of strength marks great merit.

化.mnemonic: A standing person beside a fallen one — transformation in form.

医.mnemonic: A hidden arrow in a box — the doctor's tools concealed within.

午.mnemonic: A pestle shape marks midday — the sun at its peak, noon.

卒.mnemonic: Ten people under a roof complete their training and graduate.

危.mnemonic: A person crouching at a cliff edge — danger is imminent.

原.mnemonic: Under a cliff a spring of water flows across the open plain.

厳.mnemonic: A cliff looms over double mouths — a stern, severe command.

去.mnemonic: A person (人) leaving the ground (土) behind — to go away.

参.mnemonic: Three drops fall over a big person — to participate by joining the group.

及.mnemonic: A hand reaching out to catch up — to reach or extend to someone.

友.mnemonic: Two hands joined together — the mark of a true friend.

反.mnemonic: A cliff with a hand pushing back — to oppose or reverse.

収.mnemonic: A claw grips with a hand — to collect and take in.

取.mnemonic: An ear seized by a hand — to take by grabbing.

受.mnemonic: One hand passes down to another hand below — to receive.

口.mnemonic: A simple open square — the shape of an open mouth.

可.mnemonic: A mouth bends with a hook — to approve and say yes.

台.mnemonic: A mouth sits atop a private space — a raised platform to speak from.

司.mnemonic: A mouth under a roof with a bending stroke — an official who commands.

合.mnemonic: A roof over a mouth — people come together to speak as one.

同.mnemonic: A shared opening inside a frame — everyone inside is the same.

名.mnemonic: In the dark evening you call a mouth — speak your name in the night.

向.mnemonic: A window opening over a mouth — facing forward and speaking out.

国.mnemonic: A jewel enclosed within a border — a nation's treasure defended by walls.

園.mnemonic: Clothes and soil enclosed in a wall — a walled garden estate.

土.mnemonic: A cross planted in the ground — a mound of earth.

在.mnemonic: A hand reaching into earth — to exist and be present here.

地.mnemonic: Earth that coils like a snake — the winding ground beneath us.

均.mnemonic: Earth divided evenly by a ladle — all land made equal.

型.mnemonic: Earth shaped by a mold — a pattern pressed into the ground.

域.mnemonic: Earth bounded by a weapon and mouth — a defended territory.

基.mnemonic: Its and earth stacked together — a foundation built on solid ground.

堕.mnemonic: Left and earth collapse — to fall down into the ground.

場.mnemonic: Earth lit by the sun's rays — an open sunlit place.

塗.mnemonic: Water meets earth on a path — mud smeared as a coating.

増.mnemonic: Earth piled high with layers — heaping up to increase.

壊.mnemonic: Earth wraps around a ghost — the ground breaks into ruin.

声.mnemonic: A scholar's mouth on a roof — a voice projected from above.

否.mnemonic: A mouth under 'not' — saying no, denying everything.

味.mnemonic: The mouth savors a tree full of fruit — that's taste!

呼.mnemonic: A mouth calling out using breath — to call or exhale.

品.mnemonic: Three mouths stacked — many goods to talk about.

員.mnemonic: A mouth over a shell (money) — a member who earns a wage.

哲.mnemonic: A hand chopping wisely speaks through a mouth — philosophy.

問.mnemonic: A gate with a mouth inside — asking questions through the door.

善.mnemonic: Two horns over a mouth — speaking good and virtuous words.

喋.mnemonic: A mouth above a leaf — chattering like leaves in the wind.

嘆.mnemonic: A mouth sighing over a difficult han — lamenting in grief.

嘘.mnemonic: A mouth blowing like a tiger's breath — telling a lie.

器.mnemonic: Four mouths around a dog — vessels used to feed the pack.

因.mnemonic: A person lying inside a box — the cause is being boxed in.

囲.mnemonic: A well enclosed in a border — surrounded on all sides.

固.mnemonic: An ancient thing enclosed in walls — solid and hardened.

売.mnemonic: A samurai's crown sits atop a person trading goods — to sell.

変.mnemonic: Twisted threads on top, a walking person below — change is afoot.

夏.mnemonic: A crowned head over legs — a person dressed up for summer festivals.

外.mnemonic: An evening moon and a divination crack — outsiders divine at night.

多.mnemonic: Two evenings stacked — so many nights passing by, many indeed.

夢.mnemonic: Grass and eyes over a bed at night — dreaming under moonlit covers.

大.mnemonic: A person with arms spread wide — big and expansive.

天.mnemonic: One line above a big person — heaven is above all.

失.mnemonic: A big person with something slipping from their hand — to lose it.

奇.mnemonic: A big person stooped and strange — riding on something odd and curious.

契.mnemonic: A knife cuts a mark big enough for all — a solemn contract is made.

奪.mnemonic: A big person forcibly takes a bird in hand — to seize and snatch away.

奮.mnemonic: A big bird in a field stirs up energy — rousing excitement all around.

好.mnemonic: A woman with a child beside her — what could be better, it is good.

妙.mnemonic: A young woman beside a tiny mark — delicate and wonderfully subtle.

寂.mnemonic: Under a roof, a man and a tree sit alone in silence.

寄.mnemonic: Under a roof, a strange person draws near to visit.

寒.mnemonic: Under a roof, a person on the ground surrounded by ice feels cold.

察.mnemonic: Under a roof, meat on an altar is inspected carefully.

寧.mnemonic: Under a roof, a heart over a vessel — peaceful and at ease.

対.mnemonic: A branch paired with an inch — two things set against each other.

寿.mnemonic: An elder's hand holding a measuring inch — a long life measured out.

専.mnemonic: A field with a dot, measured by the inch — focused on one specialty.

将.mnemonic: A general's bed and hand, measured inch by inch — commanding troops.

導.mnemonic: A road led by someone who knows the way — to guide and lead.

小.mnemonic: Three small dots spreading apart — something tiny and small.

少.mnemonic: Small with a slash cutting it down — even fewer, very little.

尚.mnemonic: A chimney above a mouth — exalting words, still and yet esteemed.

就.mnemonic: A capital tower beside a dog — approaching the high place to take a position.

尽.mnemonic: Two hands over a fire — burning everything until exhausted.

妨.mnemonic: A woman (女) beside a square (方) — she blocks the path like a wall.

始.mnemonic: A woman (女) gives birth to a new self (台) — that's where it all begins.

娘.mnemonic: A woman (女) who is good (良) — a beloved daughter.

婚.mnemonic: A woman (女) and the day (日)氏 clan unite — a marriage ceremony.

嫌.mnemonic: A woman (女) with a double-handed grip (兼) — she holds a deep dislike.

子.mnemonic: A swaddled baby with arms out — a child.

字.mnemonic: A child (子) under a roof (宀) — studying indoors makes a written character.

存.mnemonic: A bent hand (ナ) over a child (子) — protecting what exists.

学.mnemonic: Two hands (爻) over a roof (冖) sheltering a child (子) — learning in school.

安.mnemonic: A woman (女) resting under a roof (宀) — peaceful and safe.

完.mnemonic: Under a roof (宀) the original (元) work is done — complete.

定.mnemonic: Under a roof (宀) one walks a straight path (疋) — firmly decided.

害.mnemonic: Under a roof (宀) a mouth (口) speaks through a twisted tongue (丰) — causing harm.

家.mnemonic: A pig (豕) under a roof (宀) — where livestock live, a home.

容.mnemonic: A valley (谷) under a roof (宀) — spacious enough to contain and accept.

居.mnemonic: An old man crouching under a roof — staying put at home.

届.mnemonic: A body crouched at a mountain pass, delivering news from afar.

屋.mnemonic: A body under a roof reaches its destination — a shop or house.

崩.mnemonic: Two mountains stacked on a mountain — they collapse into rubble.

巡.mnemonic: Rivers wind around and around — patrolling every bend.

工.mnemonic: A ruler bridging top and bottom — the craftsman's tool.

巧.mnemonic: A craftsman's work plus a twist — skillfully clever.

己.mnemonic: A coiled snake shape — the self curled within.

布.mnemonic: A hand spreads cloth flat — fabric spread wide.

希.mnemonic: Cloth stretched on crossed threads — rare and desired.

師.mnemonic: Many people gathered under a banner follow the master teacher.

帰.mnemonic: A broom sweeps cloth back home — returning to where you belong.

常.mnemonic: A cloth banner hanging from the roof — always present, constant.

平.mnemonic: A plant spreading evenly on water — perfectly flat and level.

年.mnemonic: A grain stalk bent by the harvest season — marking another year.

応.mnemonic: A person's heart responds when called.

念.mnemonic: Now the heart holds a thought in mind.

怖.mnemonic: The heart trembles before a cloth-covered ghost — fear!

思.mnemonic: A field of worries weighs on the heart — deep thought.

怠.mnemonic: The heart of a lazy person lies down and does nothing.

急.mnemonic: Gripping a hand over the heart makes you rush urgently.

性.mnemonic: A feeling growing from life itself defines one's nature.

怯.mnemonic: The heart shrinks small — cowardly and timid.

恐.mnemonic: Gripping work strikes fear into the heart below.

悩.mnemonic: The heart tangled in twisting troubles — anguish.

悪.mnemonic: An Asian heart gone wrong turns evil.

悲.mnemonic: A non-heart — a heart that is not — feels only sorrow.

情.mnemonic: The heart holds pure blue feelings — emotion and passion.

惑.mnemonic: Some mouth on land confuses the heart — delusion.

惰.mnemonic: The heart slumps like flesh on a ledge — pure laziness.

幸.mnemonic: A lucky hand holds a standing cross — fortune found in stillness.

幼.mnemonic: A tiny child with thread-thin strength is still so young.

店.mnemonic: Under a roof, a diviner tells you where to find the shop.

府.mnemonic: Under the government roof, a hand gives out official pay.

度.mnemonic: Under a roof, a hand measures again — each degree counted.

庭.mnemonic: Under a roof, a path stretches into the garden courtyard.

康.mnemonic: Under a sheltering roof, grain is threshed — a healthy harvest.

建.mnemonic: A brush-wielding hand walks forward to build something new.

弁.mnemonic: Two private parts flanking a divider — a speech cap on debate.

式.mnemonic: A work tool held up with craft marks a proper ceremony.

弟.mnemonic: A bow wrapped with cords from top down — younger brother follows in order.

張.mnemonic: A bow stretched long across the land — tension pulled to its limit.

強.mnemonic: A bow with a beetle's tough shell — strong as an insect's armor.

当.mnemonic: A small dot atop a field — hitting right on the mark.

彙.mnemonic: A hedgehog-like creature gathers words into a single collection.

形.mnemonic: An open shape traced by a well (井-like top) with decorative hair strokes — the very form of a thing.

影.mnemonic: The sun shines on scenery (景) and casts flowing shadow strokes (彡).

役.mnemonic: A person (彳) uses a weapon (殳) to perform their duty or role.

彼.mnemonic: Walking (彳) past a slope (皮) — that person over there, 'he/she'.

待.mnemonic: Walking slowly (彳) at a temple (寺) — you stop and wait.

律.mnemonic: One walks (彳) step by step (聿, writing brush) following strict rules.

後.mnemonic: Walking (彳) with a twisted thread (幺) underfoot slows you — you fall behind.

徒.mnemonic: Walking (彳) on the earth (土) with a running foot (走 base) — a follower on foot.

従.mnemonic: Two people walk (彳) together following one path — to follow or obey.

得.mnemonic: Walking (彳) to seize (㝉) something with a hand — to obtain and gain.

心.mnemonic: Three drops around a curved line — a heart beating with feeling.

忄.mnemonic: Two slashes and a vertical stroke on the left — the heart radical, signaling emotion.

必.mnemonic: A heart (心) pierced through its center — something you absolutely must do.

忘.mnemonic: Death (亡) sits atop the heart (心) — when the heart dies, you forget.

忙.mnemonic: The heart (忄) loses itself (亡) — when you're busy, your heart feels lost.

意.mnemonic: Sound from the heart — a mind full of meaning.

愚.mnemonic: A monkey-like creature with a foolish heart — stupidity.

感.mnemonic: A spear-cut mouth over a heart — feelings cut deep.

態.mnemonic: A bear-like creature with a heart shows its manner/attitude.

慨.mnemonic: An indignant heart filled with a sense of already-past grief.

成.mnemonic: A halberd finishing its strike — the task is accomplished.

戦.mnemonic: Single and ocarina sounds clash with a halberd — war!

戸.mnemonic: A single-panel door hanging on a hinge — a household door.

戻.mnemonic: A dog slipping back under the door — to return.

所.mnemonic: A door beside an axe marks the place where work is done.

手.mnemonic: Five fingers spread on a palm — a hand.

扌.mnemonic: A hand radical on the side — the reaching gesture of a hand.

才.mnemonic: A single cross stroke on a stem — the seed of natural talent.

打.mnemonic: A hand striking a nail — to hit or strike.

承.mnemonic: Two hands passing water downward — to receive and carry on.

把.mnemonic: A hand grips the snake-like coil — to grasp.

抑.mnemonic: A hand presses down on a kneeling figure — to suppress.

投.mnemonic: A hand throws a javelin-like weapon — to throw.

折.mnemonic: A hand chops with an axe — to fold or break.

抜.mnemonic: A hand pulls a friend out — to extract or pull out.

択.mnemonic: A hand picks from a branching choice — to select.

抱.mnemonic: A hand wraps around a womb — to embrace or hold.

押.mnemonic: A hand pushes down on a shell — to press or push.

拒.mnemonic: A hand blocks a giant obstacle — to refuse or reject.

拘.mnemonic: A hand seizes someone in a confined sentence — to detain.

拝.mnemonic: Two hands raised in reverent worship — to worship or bow.

拠.mnemonic: A hand holds a tiger's lair as its base — stronghold.

持.mnemonic: A hand grips a temple — to hold or carry.

指.mnemonic: A hand points with a spoon-like finger — to point or indicate.

挫.mnemonic: A hand is crushed by a sitting mountain — to sprain or frustrate.

教.mnemonic: A child under a roof learns to count, guided by a hand with a stick.

敢.mnemonic: A person acts boldly, striking with determination.

散.mnemonic: Plants are struck and scattered in all directions.

数.mnemonic: A woman with a hand counts by striking tallies.

整.mnemonic: A bundle of things is struck and arranged neatly at a table.

文.mnemonic: Crossing lines mark a pattern — the origin of writing.

料.mnemonic: Rice measured in a ladle — ingredients for a meal.

断.mnemonic: An axe cuts through a skein of thread — to sever decisively.

新.mnemonic: A standing tree is cut with an axe — freshly hewn and new.

方.mnemonic: A handle with a crossbar — the shape of a square direction.

旅.mnemonic: Under a banner, people travel together on a journey.

族.mnemonic: Arrows fly under a banner — a clan rallying together.

日.mnemonic: A circle with a line inside — the sun shining bright.

昇.mnemonic: The sun rises above the horizon, climbing upward.

明.mnemonic: Sun and moon together flood the world with brightness.

朝.mnemonic: The sun rises beside the moon over the marsh — it's morning.

期.mnemonic: Standing at a crossroads by the moon, you mark a fixed period.

木.mnemonic: A tree with branches above and roots below — just a tree.

未.mnemonic: A tree with an extra branch on top — not yet fully grown.

末.mnemonic: A tree with a long branch at the top — the tip, the end.

本.mnemonic: A tree with a mark at its root — the origin, the base.

条.mnemonic: A person walking through a tree-lined strip — one long article.

来.mnemonic: A person arrives and hangs their coat on a tree — coming here.

果.mnemonic: A field sits on top of a tree — fruit hanging from a tree.

柄.mnemonic: A tree handle gripped by a figure — a stalk, a design.

柔.mnemonic: A spear rests against a tree — its wood bends soft and flexible.

校.mnemonic: Trees crossed like an X — where knowledge is crossed and checked at school.

根.mnemonic: A tree with a good foundation — its roots go deep.

格.mnemonic: A tree with each branch sorted — the standard, the rank.

案.mnemonic: A peaceful woman rests under a tree — she ponders a plan.

昔.mnemonic: The sun shines over layers of earth — days long past.

春.mnemonic: Three suns warm the budding plants — spring has arrived.

時.mnemonic: The sun marks the moment by a temple on the hill — time.

晩.mnemonic: The sun dips behind a cliff — late evening arrives.

普.mnemonic: Two suns side by side light the whole world — universal.

景.mnemonic: The sun shines on the capital city — a grand scenery.

暗.mnemonic: When the sun hides by a closed sound, everything goes dark.

暴.mnemonic: The blazing sun over a shared rice field erupts in violence.

更.mnemonic: The sun rises again over a person — renewed, once more.

書.mnemonic: A brush in hand under the sun puts words on paper — writing.

最.mnemonic: The sun rises and a hand takes the very first pick — the most.

月.mnemonic: A crescent with two inner marks — the glowing moon.

有.mnemonic: A hand holds the moon — to possess and have it.

服.mnemonic: The flesh-moon beside a kneeling person — wearing a garment.

望.mnemonic: A person stands on the earth watching the moon — to hope and gaze.

桶.mnemonic: A wooden barrel shaped like a barrel with a lid on top.

棺.mnemonic: A wooden box (coffin) that holds a corpse inside.

検.mnemonic: Inspect the tree carefully — examine every branch.

業.mnemonic: A frame of work sits atop a tree — the whole enterprise grows upward.

極.mnemonic: A tree stretched to the ultimate pole, extreme at both ends.

楽.mnemonic: White strings stretched over a tree make joyful music.

構.mnemonic: A tree with a frame built around it — a structure constructed of wood.

様.mnemonic: A wooden post with water and a sheep — the shape of an elegant manner.

標.mnemonic: A tree marked with a West symbol — a posted sign or mark.

権.mnemonic: A tree with a crane perched — it holds authority over the land.

機.mnemonic: A wooden loom with intricate threads — the machine of weaving.

欠.mnemonic: A person opening their mouth wide to yawn — something is lacking.

次.mnemonic: Ice water poured out — the next drop follows in sequence.

欲.mnemonic: A valley of desire opens the mouth wide — craving and wanting.

欺.mnemonic: Its, deceive — someone opens their mouth in falsehood like a period of time.

歌.mnemonic: Two mouths open wide to sing a beautiful song.

止.mnemonic: A foot planted firmly — stop right there.

正.mnemonic: One step in the right direction makes it correct.

武.mnemonic: A warrior stops his spear to show true martial valor.

歩.mnemonic: Stop and a few dots — each step is a small pause forward.

死.mnemonic: Bones on the left and a person kneeling — the image of death.

段.mnemonic: A hand strikes steps carved into stone — a staircase level.

殺.mnemonic: A weapon strike plus trees and a hook — killing with force.

毅.mnemonic: A wild boar meets a weapon — fierce, resolute determination.

母.mnemonic: A woman with two dots marking her breasts — a nurturing mother.

毎.mnemonic: Mother appears every single day without fail.

毒.mnemonic: Every plant growing in this place is poisonous.

民.mnemonic: A blade pressed to an eye — subjects kept under control.

気.mnemonic: Steam rising from cooked rice — the vital energy of breath.

水.mnemonic: Flowing lines branch out like a river — pure water.

求.mnemonic: A hand reaching out with claws — to seek and demand.

決.mnemonic: Water breaking through a dam — a decision cuts through doubt.

没.mnemonic: Water swallows something whole — it sinks and is gone.

沿.mnemonic: Water flows along the shore — following the riverbank.

況.mnemonic: Water reflects the current state — conditions flow like a river.

法.mnemonic: Water must follow rules — law channels it like a riverbed.

泣.mnemonic: Water streams from a standing person — tears from crying.

注.mnemonic: Water poured straight down from a master — to pour and annotate.

活.mnemonic: Water flows from the tongue — speaking and living are active.

派.mnemonic: Water splits into tributaries — branching into different factions.

浮.mnemonic: Water beneath a child — buoyed up, floating on the surface.

浴.mnemonic: Water poured into a valley — a bathing pool in the hollow.

海.mnemonic: Water every day — the vast sea surrounds us always.

液.mnemonic: Water from the night sky — dew drips down as liquid.

深.mnemonic: Water hides a mother in a cave — the depths are dark and deep.

済.mnemonic: Water flows through a market stall — the debt is settled.

渉.mnemonic: Water crossed by two feet — to wade across.

温.mnemonic: Water held in a dish under the sun — warm liquid.

測.mnemonic: Water levels measured beside a rule — to survey depth.

準.mnemonic: Water finds a bird's level — the standard is balanced.

滅.mnemonic: Water smothers a flame with a halberd — extinction.

滑.mnemonic: Water over a bone makes the surface slippery.

漢.mnemonic: Water flows through the Han grassland — the Chinese river.

潜.mnemonic: Water hides beneath two workers — to lurk underwater.

点.mnemonic: A divining rod over fire marks the spot — a point.

無.mnemonic: A dancer waving arms over fire — nothing remains after burning.

然.mnemonic: Meat beside a dog is set on fire — burning naturally.

燃.mnemonic: Fire ignites what burns naturally — to combust.

父.mnemonic: A hand raised holding a rod — the father disciplines.

版.mnemonic: A half-split plank struck by a hand — a printing board.

物.mnemonic: A cow's colorful markings make it a distinct thing.

特.mnemonic: A cow at a temple is a special, unique offering.

犬.mnemonic: A big creature with a dot — a dog.

状.mnemonic: A dog beside a tree captures the shape of things.

猫.mnemonic: A dog-like animal that eats plants and fish — a cat.

獅.mnemonic: A fierce animal with a master's mane — a lion.

王.mnemonic: Three horizontal lines joined by one — the king rules all.

現.mnemonic: A king's jewel reveals what is present and real.

理.mnemonic: A king who farms the land governs with reason.

生.mnemonic: A plant sprouting from the ground — life emerging.

産.mnemonic: Life sprouting under a cliff with a standing figure — production.

用.mnemonic: A bucket ready to be used — utility and function.

田.mnemonic: A grid of rice paddies — a field.

由.mnemonic: A sprout pushing up through a field — reason arising freely.

申.mnemonic: A line piercing through a field — the gods speak through lightning.

界.mnemonic: A field divided by borders marks the boundary of a world.

略.mnemonic: In a field, each stroke is abbreviated to map out a plan.

異.mnemonic: A field atop two hands raised high — something strange stands out.

疑.mnemonic: A person stops at a crossroads, spear in hand, full of doubt.

疲.mnemonic: Illness from the skin wears a person down to exhaustion.

病.mnemonic: Sickness enters the body like ice-cold water in a bottle.

症.mnemonic: Sickness that is correct and proper — a defined symptom.

痩.mnemonic: Sickness leaves you thin — scavenging the last scraps.

癒.mnemonic: From sickness, a healing heart and valley restore you.

発.mnemonic: Feet launching upward — energy shooting out in departure.

白.mnemonic: A single ray shining from the sun — pure white light.

百.mnemonic: One stroke atop white — a hundred shining units.

的.mnemonic: A white sun on a cloth — a bright target to aim at.

皆.mnemonic: Side by side under white — everyone together in a row.

皮.mnemonic: A hand peeling hide from an animal — raw skin.

益.mnemonic: Water overflows the vessel — a surplus, a benefit.

目.mnemonic: A single eye drawn upright — just an eye.

直.mnemonic: Ten eyes look straight — seeing directly and honestly.

相.mnemonic: A tree and an eye together — looking at the true form of things.

省.mnemonic: A small eye examines carefully — to reflect and omit.

真.mnemonic: Ten eyes on a hidden inner self — the true essence.

眠.mnemonic: An eye turned to the people's rest — the eye that sleeps.

着.mnemonic: A sheep-like top falls onto the eye below — arriving and putting on clothes.

睡.mnemonic: An eye droops like a hanging plant — falling asleep.

知.mnemonic: An arrow shot from the mouth — knowledge spoken with precision.

確.mnemonic: A stone-solid bird's nest — certain and confirmed.

磨.mnemonic: Hemp ground against a stone — to polish and grind.

示.mnemonic: An altar table with offerings displayed — to show and reveal.

礼.mnemonic: At the altar a person kneels — a ritual bow of respect.

社.mnemonic: An altar and the earth — a shrine where the land deity dwells.

筋.mnemonic: Bamboo over moon and strength — muscle fibers strong as bamboo.

策.mnemonic: Bamboo whip used to prod a bundle — a plan or policy.

箋.mnemonic: Bamboo sheets cut precisely — writing paper notes.

粒.mnemonic: Rice grain standing upright — a small round grain.

系.mnemonic: Twisted threads hanging down — a lineage or system.

約.mnemonic: Thread tied in a spoon-knot — a binding promise.

紅.mnemonic: Red thread runs through craft work — crimson red.

紙.mnemonic: Thread-thin sheets spread like an氏 clan — paper.

級.mnemonic: Thread pulled to reach a level — a rank or grade.

素.mnemonic: Bundled threads over a hand — the basic raw element.

終.mnemonic: Thread runs to winter's end — the final conclusion.

経.mnemonic: Thread passing through a loom notch — a passage of time/sutra.

結.mnemonic: Thread tied in a lucky knot — to tie or conclude.

絡.mnemonic: Thread wound around each part — to entwine or contact.

給.mnemonic: Thread of supply joins together — to provide or supply.

絶.mnemonic: A person kneels by silk threads, cutting them off completely.

緊.mnemonic: A firm grasp holds silk threads so tightly they become tense.

締.mnemonic: Silk threads are tied around a sovereign's domain to close it off.

練.mnemonic: Silk threads are bundled in a row to practice making them smooth.

績.mnemonic: Silk threads are woven with great responsibility to achieve merit.

繁.mnemonic: Every branch of silk thread multiplies, making the cloth lush and flourishing.

繰.mnemonic: Silk threads are carefully reeled from a nest, repeating over and over.

罰.mnemonic: Words spoken under a net become a sword of punishment.

美.mnemonic: A large sheep is beautiful — prized for its fine wool.

群.mnemonic: A君 (lord) leads a flock of sheep — that's a crowd.

義.mnemonic: A sheep under a lance stands for righteous virtue.

習.mnemonic: A bird's feathers flutter as it repeatedly practices flying.

老.mnemonic: An elderly person hunched over a cane — that's old age.

考.mnemonic: An old bent elder turns thoughts over like a spoon — to think.

者.mnemonic: An elder tends thorny plants — this defines a particular person.

聞.mnemonic: An ear inside a gate hears everything passing through.

職.mnemonic: An ear hears the sound of colors — that's how you know your occupation.

育.mnemonic: A baby born upside-down grows up nurtured by the flesh below.

胆.mnemonic: The body organ glowing like the sun is the bold, courageous gallbladder.

能.mnemonic: A bear-like creature with claws embodies natural talent and ability.

脈.mnemonic: Flesh with a flowing branching stream — blood pulses through veins.

腹.mnemonic: The flesh of the body hides a復-like interior — that's your belly.

自.mnemonic: A nose drawn from above — pointing to yourself means 'self'.

至.mnemonic: An arrow plunging down to the ground — it has arrived at its destination.

興.mnemonic: Two hands lift a shared vessel together — that sparks excitement and interest.

舌.mnemonic: A tongue is a thousand mouths — it tastes and talks.

舎.mnemonic: A person rests under a roof — that's a lodging house.

舞.mnemonic: Two feet dance beneath flowing sleeves — a beautiful performance.

良.mnemonic: Grain filtered and refined until only the good remains — excellent quality.

芻.mnemonic: Grass cut repeatedly by hand — that's fodder, mowing for livestock.

若.mnemonic: Grass over a right hand — a young person bending to pick fresh herbs.

苦.mnemonic: Grass over an ancient past — bitter old weeds that cause suffering.

茶.mnemonic: Grass over wood and a person — tea is brewed from plants over a wooden fire.

落.mnemonic: Grass, water, and each — fallen leaves drift down each raindrop.

葉.mnemonic: Grass over a world of trees — leaves spread across the forest world.

著.mnemonic: Grass atop an elder — a distinguished old author renowned like a towering herb.

蓄.mnemonic: Grass over a field animal — storing fodder like livestock stockpile plants.

血.mnemonic: A vessel with a drop inside — blood collected in a bowl.

行.mnemonic: A crossroads with steps on each side — people go and come along the road.

衣.mnemonic: A collar draping down into sleeves — the full shape of a garment.

被.mnemonic: Clothing over skin — a garment that covers and protects the body.

装.mnemonic: Clothing at the bottom with a warrior on top — a soldier dressing in full gear.

裏.mnemonic: Clothing wrapped around a village field — the inside lining hidden within.

補.mnemonic: Clothing patched with a useful tool — mending a garment to make it complete.

襲.mnemonic: Clothing layered over a dragon and many — wave after wave of garments in a surprise attack.

足.mnemonic: A mouth perched on a leg — the foot speaks with every step.

躍.mnemonic: A foot leaping like a bird with feathers — to jump wildly.

車.mnemonic: A wheel with axle seen from above — a cart or vehicle.

転.mnemonic: A cart wheel rolls and turns on the ground.

辞.mnemonic: Tangled tongue-tied speech leads someone to resign.

込.mnemonic: Someone enters and the path becomes crowded.

迎.mnemonic: A kneeling person on the road goes out to welcome you.

返.mnemonic: Walk the road back the other way — to return.

追.mnemonic: A mound-like figure moves along the road in pursuit.

送.mnemonic: Two hands toss someone off along the road — to send away.

逃.mnemonic: A person flees down the road twisting away to escape.

逆.mnemonic: A figure tumbles upside-down on the road — going against the flow.

途.mnemonic: A road leads through the middle of a journey — the way en route.

通.mnemonic: A path with a lid you pass right through — to go through.

連.mnemonic: A cart rolls down the road linking things together.

週.mnemonic: Walking around the same path every week.

進.mnemonic: A bird advancing forward along the road.

遂.mnemonic: Following the path all the way to accomplish the goal.

遅.mnemonic: A sheep moving along the road slowly — always late.

遊.mnemonic: A child with a flag wanders freely along the road to play.

過.mnemonic: Walking past the skeleton — time passes by.

達.mnemonic: A lamb reaches its destination along the road.

違.mnemonic: Two people on the road going different ways — they differ.

遠.mnemonic: A garment-robed figure travels the long winding road far away.

遭.mnemonic: Encountering something in the road's crossroads by chance.

選.mnemonic: An heir is chosen from among those along the road.

遺.mnemonic: A precious thing left behind on the road — a legacy.

避.mnemonic: A king steps aside on the road to avoid trouble.

還.mnemonic: Circling back around the road — returning home.

部.mnemonic: A mound marks the division of each section of the village.

識.mnemonic: Words spoken with a halberd-like precision form knowledge.

警.mnemonic: A man speaks with a halberd to warn and alert others.

議.mnemonic: Speak with proper etiquette to hold a deliberation.

護.mnemonic: Speak with a heron's care to protect someone.

負.mnemonic: A person kneeling under a shell bears a burden and loses.

買.mnemonic: A net cast over shells of money — you buy goods.

費.mnemonic: Money split and spent — expenses drain the shell of cash.

賃.mnemonic: A person bears a load for shell-money as wages.

資.mnemonic: A next-of-kin holds shell-money as capital resources.

賛.mnemonic: Two people offering shell-money — they praise and assist.

質.mnemonic: Two axes weigh down the shell — testing quality and nature.

赤.mnemonic: Earth ablaze beneath the sun — the color red.

走.mnemonic: A person on the ground strides forward — running.

起.mnemonic: Running with a snake-coil posture — rising up to start.

越.mnemonic: Run past a halberd barrier — to exceed and cross over.

非.mnemonic: Two wings spread apart — something is wrong, contrary.

面.mnemonic: A field framed by a border and crossed lines — a face like a mask.

音.mnemonic: Stand atop the sun and let sound rise — music from the day.

響.mnemonic: Sound from the village echoes back — a resonating response.

頁.mnemonic: A page is a head on a cliff — the top of a document.

項.mnemonic: Work on a page yields a numbered clause — an article or item.

頑.mnemonic: A stubborn head is rooted like the origin — unyielding.

頗.mnemonic: The skin of a head appears biased — rather, quite extreme.

領.mnemonic: A commanding neck orders territory — a leader's domain.

頭.mnemonic: A bean-shaped skull atop a page — the head.

頻.mnemonic: Steps repeated at the head — frequent occurrence.

頼.mnemonic: Bundle up a page and rely on it — to depend on someone.

題.mnemonic: The correct head of the matter is the title — a topic.

額.mnemonic: A visitor's head reveals a fixed sum — a forehead or amount.

顔.mnemonic: A colorful head with a standing form — a beautiful face.

郷.mnemonic: Villagers kneel together in their hometown village.

配.mnemonic: A person kneels beside a wine jar to distribute the brew.

酒.mnemonic: Water poured into a wine jar makes sake.

釈.mnemonic: A measuring hand frees meaning from a wine jar — to explain/release.

重.mnemonic: A person carries a heavy sack on their back over the ground — weighty.

量.mnemonic: The sun rises over a village field — measure the distance by daylight.

金.mnemonic: Gold nuggets hidden under the earth shine like the sun — metal and money.

針.mnemonic: A metal tool as thin as ten hairs — a needle.

錬.mnemonic: Metal is kneaded and refined through skilled handiwork — to temper.

録.mnemonic: Metal marks are carved to record events for eternity.

鎖.mnemonic: Small metal shells linked together form a chain.

長.mnemonic: A long-haired elder stands tall — the image of length and age.

門.mnemonic: Two wooden gate panels side by side — a gate.

閉.mnemonic: A gate with a latch bar across it — shut and closed.

開.mnemonic: Two hands lift the bar on the gate — open it wide.

閑.mnemonic: A tree stands inside the gate — peaceful and quiet.

間.mnemonic: Moonlight shines through the gate — a gap in time or space.

関.mnemonic: A gate with a barrier mechanism — a critical checkpoint.

阪.mnemonic: A mound on a hillside with a slope — Osaka's famous terrain.

降.mnemonic: From the mound, two feet step down — descending a hill.

限.mnemonic: At the mound's edge, eyes look back — a boundary is set.

除.mnemonic: On the mound, a surplus is cast aside — to remove and exclude.

陥.mnemonic: A mound caves in, trapping what was inside — to fall into a pit.

険.mnemonic: The mound is all sharp points — a dangerous,险 险 steep cliff.

集.mnemonic: A bird perches on a tree — birds gather together.

雑.mnemonic: A bird among trees, mixed with nine others — a jumbled flock.

難.mnemonic: A bird trapped by thorny vines — in a difficult, tangled situation.

雨.mnemonic: Raindrops falling under a cloudy sky — the shape of rain.

電.mnemonic: Rain clouds with a lightning bolt tail — electricity from the storm.

青.mnemonic: Fresh life growing on the earth — the blue-green of spring.

黒.mnemonic: A rice field (田) sits over fire (灬), charring everything black.

黙.mnemonic: A black (黒) dog (犬) stays silent, not barking.

鼻.mnemonic: Self (自) over the nose radical (畀) — point to yourself to find your nose.

齎.mnemonic: Teeth (歯) carry resources (齊) — bringing goods delivered bite by bite.

齢.mnemonic: Teeth (歯) mark the years (令) — a dentist reads your age from your teeth.

願.mnemonic: The source (原) of your heart's (頁) deepest wish wells up like a spring.

風.mnemonic: A bug (虫) rides the wind through a sail-like frame — breeze in motion.

飛.mnemonic: Wings spread wide on both sides as a bird lifts off and flies.

食.mnemonic: A person (亻shape) gathers good things under a roof to eat a meal.

飲.mnemonic: By the food radical (食), a yawning mouth (欠) opens wide to drink.

飾.mnemonic: Food (食) and a cloth (巾) on a person combine into beautiful decoration.

養.mnemonic: A sheep (羊) provides food (食) below — raising and nourishing life.

饒.mnemonic: Food (食) in abundance (尭) — so plentiful it overflows into richness.

駄.mnemonic: A horse (馬) carrying a big (大) load — a pack horse bearing a burden.

駐.mnemonic: A horse (馬) stands at a master's (主) post — parked and stationary.

験.mnemonic: A horse (馬) tested by all (僉) challengers — put to the examination.

高.mnemonic: A tall tower with a gate at the base — standing high above all.

魔.mnemonic: Under a hemp (麻) roof, a demon (鬼) hides — the source of all evil magic.

鳥.mnemonic: A bird's eye, wings, body, and tail feathers — a complete bird in one glyph.

鳴.mnemonic: A bird (鳥) opens its mouth (口) and cries out — the sound of singing.

祖.mnemonic: An altar stone and an ancestor tablet — honoring the grandfather of the clan.

禺.mnemonic: A field atop a beast's body — a strange creature lurking in the wild.

私.mnemonic: A grain stalk bent privately aside — keeping grain for oneself.

科.mnemonic: Grain measured in a bucket — classifying crops into categories.

秒.mnemonic: A tiny grain tip — as brief as a second of time.

稚.mnemonic: A young grain stalk beside a small bird — immature and juvenile.

積.mnemonic: Grain piled up in layers by a spinning loom — accumulating a great store.

究.mnemonic: Digging to the bottom of a cave — searching until you reach the end.

空.mnemonic: A cave open to the sky — hollow and empty above.

突.mnemonic: A dog bursting out of a cave — thrusting forward suddenly.

立.mnemonic: A person standing upright on the ground — the shape of standing still.

章.mnemonic: A sound rising from a standing figure — a badge marking a completed verse.

端.mnemonic: Standing at the mountain's edge, a plant clings to the tip.

笑.mnemonic: Bamboo bending like two people laughing — a smile under the reeds.

第.mnemonic: Bamboo strips bound with a bow — orderly numbered scrolls in sequence.

要.mnemonic: A woman's waist is the essential, key part of her body.

見.mnemonic: An eye mounted on legs goes out to see things.

規.mnemonic: A vision held by two people sets the standard rule.

覚.mnemonic: Claws over a school of thought awaken awareness.

親.mnemonic: Standing on a tree watching — that's what a parent does.

解.mnemonic: A horn plus a knife plus an ox — dissect to untie and explain.

言.mnemonic: Words rise like sound waves from a mouth — speaking truth.

討.mnemonic: Words plus an inch of measure — discuss in precise detail.

記.mnemonic: Words coil like a snake — record them to remember.

訳.mnemonic: Words split like branches — translation divides meaning.

診.mnemonic: Words plus a person resting — a doctor examines and diagnoses.

証.mnemonic: Righteous words stand as solid proof and testimony.

詐.mnemonic: Words made to work like a tool — crafty fraud deceives.

詞.mnemonic: Speech wrapped around a director — words are the manager of meaning.

試.mnemonic: Speech meets a weapon's formula — test your words in battle.
